title: 2026-01-08 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 11.34
description: New daily signal for 2026-01-08: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 11.34/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and volatility shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
